name: Rutile | Hot Shit Transfer
description:
Houseki no Kuni :: Human AU :: The new kid in high school, Rutile Michaels, is standoffish, stoic and most of all, antisocial. In college, she isn't any different.

Rutile Michaels is an academic overachiever focused on studies, studies, studies. No friends. That's fine. A relationship? What a waste of time. She desperately doesn't want to go back to the time when she was a pathetic nerd at the mercy of her bullies.
creator: tobekages
